description_long: This is a modern two-story house surrounded by a wooden picket fence and featuring a tiled yard with two large, stylized palm trees planted in circular beds. The house has a flat roof and a clean, minimalist white facade with large rectangular windows on both floors, allowing ample natural light inside. The front yard includes a set of steps leading up to the main entrance, which is slightly recessed and flanked by glass doors and windows. The outdoor area is partially furnished with a row of patio chairs and some potted plants, enhancing the residential feel. The overall design emphasizes geometric simplicity, open outdoor space, and a blend of natural and built elements. The house appears to be constructed primarily from concrete or stucco, with glass and wood accents.
description: A modern, two-story white house with a flat roof, large windows, and a fenced yard featuring palm trees and patio seating.
description_view_0: Side view showing the white facade, large windows, and a palm tree in the tiled yard behind the wooden fence.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the front steps, main entryway, and a prominent palm tree near the entrance.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the patio area with chairs, two palm trees, and the symmetrical arrangement of windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the second palm tree, more windows, and the continuous wooden fence.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with steps, glass doors, and minimal overhang, framed by a wooden fence and landscaping
